title: Add URL parser utility
description: Create src/utils/url-parser.ts that extracts protocol, host, path, query params, and fragment from a URL string. Add comprehensive tests in src/utils/url-parser.test.ts following existing vitest patterns.
existing_patterns: src/utils/url-shortener.ts - similar URL utility with typed interfaces and JSDoc comments
src/utils/debounce.ts - utility function with typed interfaces and co-located tests
